response.global_analysis: 1. Audio Match: The streamer speaks English natively, with occasional Japanese terms like 'kabocha' (pumpkin). 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON correctly identified that there is no vocal music, so 100% manual transcription was used to capture the streamer's commentary. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are tightly synchronized to the start and end of vocal bursts, ensuring precise tracking of her commentary during active gameplay.

subtitles.original: And then we can use the pumpkins, I guess, to make...
subtitles.english: And then we can use the pumpkins, I guess, to make...

subtitles.original: And the pumpkins grow really fast, that's the thing.
subtitles.english: And the pumpkins grow really fast, that's the thing.

subtitles.original: It does end up being quite a bit of money, just needs some active grinding.
subtitles.english: It does end up being quite a bit of money, just needs some active grinding.

subtitles.original: Like, I can do a thing where I just...
subtitles.english: Like, I can do a thing where I just...

subtitles.original: And then I would return to the beginning, and the pumpkins would have grown already.
subtitles.english: And then I would return to the beginning, and the pumpkins would have grown already.

subtitles.original: Like look, I did like one round of pumpkin harvesting and the carrots are basically all grown.
subtitles.english: Like look, I did like one round of pumpkin harvesting and the carrots are basically all grown.

subtitles.original: Like look, look at how much kabocha there is.
subtitles.english: Like look, look at how much pumpkin there is.

subtitles.original: I mean, the yield is not bad right now.
subtitles.english: I mean, the yield is not bad right now.

subtitles.original: We'll go sell. We'll see if someone has... wait, we can fill this carrot.
subtitles.english: We'll go sell. We'll see if someone has... wait, we can fill this carrot.

subtitles.original: Now, that's the pumpkin strat, is to have a pumpkin field so big, that once you make one round, it... the beginning has already regrown.
subtitles.english: Now, that's the pumpkin strat, is to have a pumpkin field so big, that once you make one round, it... the beginning has already regrown.

subtitles.original: So then, you just endlessly farm pumpkins.
subtitles.english: So then, you just endlessly farm pumpkins.

subtitles.original: Did I pick that up first? Guess I did.
subtitles.english: Did I pick that up first? Guess I did.

subtitles.original: I might not even need the fence anymore.
subtitles.english: I might not even need the fence anymore.

subtitles.original: Okay, I'll leave the eggs in here.
subtitles.english: Okay, I'll leave the eggs in here.
